scripts.build: bun run --filter '@dsqr-dotdev/database' build && bun run --filter '@dsqr-dotdev/core' build && bun run --filter './apps/*' build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter '@dsqr-dotdev/database' build && bun run --filter '@dsqr-dotdev/core' build && bun run --filter '@dsqr-dotdev/database' typecheck && bun run --filter '@dsqr-dotdev/core' typecheck && bun run --filter '@dsqr-dotdev/react' typecheck && bun run --filter 'dotdev' typecheck && bun run --filter 'studio' typecheck
